fr-core-1: The left side is inherently a collection, and so the expression 'extension.where(url = 'https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-identity-reliability').extension.where(url = 'identityStatus').value.code = 'VALI'' may fail or return false if there is more than one item in the content being evaluated

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/discharge-disposition'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer. Using version '0.1.0', found versions: 0.1.0, 4.0.1
